howToBuy.heroTitle: Jinsi ya Kununua — Mwongozo Kamili wa Ununuzi
howToBuy.heroDesc: BuildReach inaunganisha wanunuzi wa Afrika Mashariki na wasambazaji wa vifaa vya ujenzi kutoka China. Tunashughulikia utafutaji, ukaguzi wa ubora, na usafirishaji wa pamoja — ili uweze kununua vifaa vya ujenzi vya China kwa urahisi.
howToBuy.step1Desc: Tazama aina 10+ za vifaa vya ujenzi. Chuja kwa vipimo, vyeti, na njia ya usambazaji. Ongeza bidhaa kwenye orodha yako ya maombi.
howToBuy.step1Detail: Tumia utafutaji wa maneno, urambazaji wa kategoria, au vichujio vya vigezo. Hupati unachohitaji? Wasilisha mahitaji maalum.
howToBuy.step2Desc: Jaza fomu ya ombi la bei mtandaoni: chagua bidhaa, eleza idadi na bandari ya marudio. Unaweza pia kupakia picha, orodha ya BOM au maelezo.
howToBuy.step2Detail: Baada ya kuwasilisha, timu yetu itaandaa mpango wa bei kutoka kwa wasambazaji ndani ya siku 1-3 za kazi.
howToBuy.step3Desc: Pokea bei kamili ikiwa na: bei ya kila kipande, MOQ, muda wa utengenezaji, na vyeti vya bidhaa. Kagua kila kipengele mtandaoni.
howToBuy.step3Detail: Bei zinatokana na ulinganisho wa wasambazaji wengi. Utambulisho wa msambazaji hautolewi — tunahakikisha unapata bei bora.
howToBuy.step4Desc: Kubali bei ili kuunda agizo la ununuzi. Lipa amana ya 30% kukifunga agizo lako. Tunaanza mara moja kununua kutoka kwa wasambazaji.
howToBuy.step4Detail: Fuatilia hali ya agizo lako wakati wowote katika 'Maagizo Yangu'. Maelezo yote ya bidhaa, bei, na vipimo yamehifadhiwa.
howToBuy.step5Desc: Tununua kutoka kwa wasambazaji kwa niaba yako, tupanga ukaguzi wa ubora kiwandani, na kuhifadhi bidhaa baada ya kupita. Fuatilia hali ya ununuzi na ukaguzi kwa kila kipengele.
howToBuy.step5Detail: Bidhaa zisizopita ukaguzi zinarudishwa kwa wasambazaji kubadilishwa, kuhakikisha ubora kabla ya kusafirishwa.
howToBuy.step6Desc: Bidhaa zikiwa tayari, zinapakiwa katika kontena za pamoja kwa bandari ya marudio. Maagizo mengi yanashiriki kontena moja, kupunguza gharama za usafirishaji kwa kiasi kikubwa.
howToBuy.step6Detail: Meli zinaondoka Ningbo/Yiwu kwenda Dar es Salaam, takriban siku 25-30. Ratiba kamili ya usafirishaji inaonekana katika maelezo ya agizo lako.
howToBuy.step7Desc: Lipa salio la 70% kabla ya kufika bandarini. Tunasaidia na forodha ya bandari ya marudio. Thibitisha kupokea ili kukamilisha agizo.
howToBuy.step7Detail: Unahitaji vibali vya kuagiza (k.m. uthibitisho wa TBS)? Tujulishe katika RFQ yako na tunaweza kusaidia kuandaa hati zinazohitajika.
howToBuy.adv1Desc: Nunua moja kwa moja kutoka viwanda vya China, ukiondoa wakala wa kati kwa bei za kiwanda
howToBuy.adv2Desc: Ukaguzi wa ubora kabla ya kusafirisha kwa kila kundi; bidhaa zisizofaa zinabadilishwa
howToBuy.adv3Desc: Upakiaji wa pamoja (LCL): shiriki kontena na wanunuzi wengine, okoa 60%-70% ya nauli
howToBuy.adv4Desc: Ununuzi, ukaguzi, forodha, usafirishaji, na uthibitisho — yote yanashughulikiwa kwa ajili yako
howToBuy.faq1Q: Kiwango cha chini cha agizo (MOQ) ni kipi?
howToBuy.faq1A: Inatofautiana kwa aina ya bidhaa. Vifaa vingi vya ujenzi vina MOQ ya chini, inayopunguzwa zaidi na mtindo wetu wa upakiaji wa pamoja. MOQ maalum inatolewa katika kila bei.
howToBuy.faq2Q: Ni muda gani kutoka agizo hadi kupokea?
howToBuy.faq2A: Kawaida siku 45-60: ~siku 15-20 uzalishaji + ~siku 25-30 usafirishaji wa bahari + ~siku 5-7 forodha. Muda halisi unategemea muda wa utengenezaji na ratiba ya meli.
howToBuy.faq3A: Ndiyo. Andika 'sampuli inahitajika' katika RFQ yako na tutaratibu na wasambazaji. Gharama za sampuli na usafirishaji zinabebwa na mnunuzi.
howToBuy.faq4A: Kwa sasa uhamisho wa benki (T/T). Amana 30% + 70% kabla ya kufika bandarini. Njia zaidi za malipo zinakuja hivi karibuni.
howToBuy.faq5Q: Vipi kuhusu forodha na vibali vya kuagiza?
howToBuy.faq5A: Tunatoa hati zote za kusafirisha nje (orodha ya mizigo, ankara, cheti cha asili, n.k.). Msaada wa forodha na uthibitisho wa TBS unapatikana — ieleze katika RFQ yako.
howToBuy.faq6Q: Je, kama kuna matatizo ya ubora baada ya kupokea?
howToBuy.faq6A: Tunakagua kila kundi kabla ya kusafirisha. Ikiwa matatizo yanapatikana baada ya kupokea, wasiliana nasi ndani ya siku 7 na tutaratibu na msambazaji kutatua.

fulfillment.heroSub: Ununuzi wa pamoja · Ujumuishaji LCL · Forodha za umoja · Usafirishaji wa baharini
fulfillment.sectionProcessSub: Kutoka agizo hadi uwasilishaji bandarini, kila hatua imehakikishwa
fulfillment.step_P1_desc: Tunachunguza viwanda kupitia ukaguzi wa eneo, tathmini ya sifa, na majaribio ya sampuli ili kuhakikisha ubora kutoka chanzo.
fulfillment.step_P2_desc: Wasilisha mahitaji yako mtandaoni. Tunakusanya nukuu kutoka viwanda vingi na kukusaidia kuchagua chaguo bora.
fulfillment.step_P3_desc: Baada ya kuthibitisha nukuu, jukwaa linatengeneza agizo la utimizaji linalofunga bei, kiasi, na tarehe ya uwasilishaji.
fulfillment.step_1_desc: Viwanda vinazalisha kulingana na agizo la utimizaji. Tunafuatilia maendeleo ya uzalishaji na masasisho ya wakati halisi.
fulfillment.step_2_desc: Wakaguzi wa tatu wanafanya ukaguzi wa ubora kwenye tovuti kulingana na viwango vya kimataifa. Bidhaa zenye kasoro zinazuiwa.
fulfillment.step_3_desc: Bidhaa kutoka viwanda vingi zinajumuishwa kwenye ghala letu, kupakiwa kitaalamu ili kuongeza nafasi ya kontena na kupunguza gharama za usafirishaji.
fulfillment.step_4_desc: Tunashughulikia forodha za usafirishaji nje na nyaraka kamili — orodha za ufungaji, ankara, vyeti vya asili — mahali pamoja.
fulfillment.step_5_desc: Kontena kamili husafirishwa hadi bandari ya Dar es Salaam na ufuatiliaji kamili. Muda wa safari takriban siku 25-30.
fulfillment.step_6_desc: Mizigo inafika bandari ya Dar es Salaam. Tunaratibu shughuli za bandari na kupanga upakuaji kwenye ghala.
fulfillment.step_7_desc: Tunasaidia na forodha za uagizaji wa Tanzania, kushughulikia ushuru, VAT, na matamko yote ya kodi.
fulfillment.step_8_desc: Baada ya forodha, bidhaa zinawasilishwa mahali ulipoteua. Huduma ya mnyororo mzima imekamilika.
fulfillment.consolidationTitle: Maagizo madogo, kontena kamili — LCL imefanywa rahisi
fulfillment.consolidation_point1_desc: Bidhaa kutoka viwanda tofauti zinajumuishwa kwenye kontena moja. Hata maagizo madogo yanaweza kusafirishwa.
fulfillment.consolidation_point2_desc: Suluhu maalum za kuimarisha vifaa vizito vya ujenzi — kuzuia unyevu, kuzuia mshtuko, kupunguza uharibifu wakati wa usafiri.
fulfillment.consolidation_point3_desc: Kushiriki nauli ya kontena kunaokoa zaidi ya 30% ikilinganishwa na usafirishaji wa kibinafsi.
fulfillment.consolidation_point4_desc: Mizunguko ya ujumuishaji iliyowekwa, usafirishaji 2-3 kwa mwezi, na tarehe za kuwasili zinazotabirika.
fulfillment.certSub: Bidhaa zote zinazosafirishwa zinakidhi mahitaji ya uthibitisho wa nchi za mashariki ya Afrika
fulfillment.boundaryDesc: BuildReach inatoa huduma kamili kutoka viwanda vya China hadi bandari ya Dar es Salaam, ikiwa ni pamoja na uchunguzi wa wasambazaji, ununuzi wa pamoja, ukaguzi wa ubora, ujumuishaji, tamko la forodha, usafirishaji wa baharini, na forodha ya marudio. Usafiri wa ndani (bandari hadi tovuti) unapangwa na mnunuzi au lojistiki ya ndani. Jukwaa halitoi mikopo ya kifedha, uwakala wa bima, au huduma nyingine za kifedha.

helpCenter.pageDesc: Maarifa ya vitendo ya ununuzi yaliyopangwa kwa kategoria — jinsi ya kuchagua nyenzo, kutathmini ubora, na kubainisha vipimo.
helpCenter.platform_subtitle: Usajili, kuvinjari, ombi la bei, kuagiza na shughuli nyingine za msingi
helpCenter.platform_q1: BuildReach ni jukwaa la aina gani?
helpCenter.platform_a1: BuildReach ni jukwaa la ununuzi wa vifaa vya ujenzi kutoka nchi za nje kwa hatua moja. Linaunganisha viwanda bora vya China na wateja wa Afrika Mashariki. Jukwaa linatoa huduma za kuvinjari bidhaa, ombi la bei mtandaoni (RFQ), uthibitisho wa bei, uratibu wa nyaraka za kufuata sheria, usafirishaji wa makontena ya pamoja, na zaidi — kukusaidia kukamilisha ununuzi wako wa kimataifa kwa ufanisi na usalama.
helpCenter.platform_a2: Bofya "Sajili Bure" kwenye kona ya juu kulia ya ukurasa, jaza barua pepe, nambari ya simu na nenosiri ili kukamilisha usajili. Hakuna haja ya kusubiri idhini — baada ya kusajili unaweza moja kwa moja kuvinjari bidhaa na kutuma ombi la bei.
helpCenter.platform_q3: Jinsi ya kutafuta na kuvinjari bidhaa?
helpCenter.platform_a3:
Unaweza kutafuta bidhaa kwa njia zifuatazo:
• Andika maneno muhimu kwenye upau wa utafutaji juu ya ukurasa
• Vinjari kwenye ukurasa mkuu kwa kategoria sita kuu
• Chuja hatua kwa hatua kupitia urambazaji wa kategoria upande wa kushoto
Kila ukurasa wa maelezo ya bidhaa unaonyesha vipimo, picha na maelezo kamili, kukusaidia kuelewa haraka taarifa za bidhaa.
helpCenter.platform_q4: Ombi la Bei (RFQ) ni nini? Jinsi ya kutuma?
helpCenter.platform_a4:
RFQ (Request for Quotation) ni mahitaji yako ya ununuzi unayowasilisha kwenye jukwaa. Unaweza:
• Bofya "Ongeza kwenye Kikapu cha RFQ" kwenye ukurasa wa maelezo ya bidhaa, kisha wasilisha yote pamoja
• Nenda moja kwa moja kwenye ukurasa wa "RFQ Zangu" ili kuunda ombi jipya la bei
Baada ya kuwasilisha, jukwaa litawasiliana nawe haraka kuthibitisha maelezo ya mahitaji yako, kuhakikisha bei inayolingana kwa usahihi.
helpCenter.platform_q5: Baada ya kutuma ombi la bei, nitapata jibu baada ya muda gani?
helpCenter.platform_a5: Jukwaa linaahidi kujibu ndani ya masaa 24 baada ya kupokea ombi la bei. Tutathibitisha maelezo ya mahitaji yako na kukupa bei rasmi haraka iwezekanavyo kulingana na hali halisi.
helpCenter.platform_a6: Jukwaa linasaidia lugha tatu: Kichina, Kiingereza na Kiswahili. Unaweza kubadilisha lugha juu ya ukurasa. Majina ya bidhaa, majina ya kategoria na kiolesura cha mfumo vinapatikana kwa lugha zote tatu.
helpCenter.tools_subtitle: Uchaguzi na tathmini ya ubora wa zana za mkono na vifaa vya zana za umeme
helpCenter.tools_q1: Nyenzo za kawaida za zana za mkono ni zipi? Jinsi ya kuchagua?
helpCenter.tools_a1:
Nyenzo za kawaida na matumizi yake:
• Chuma cha kaboni (Carbon Steel): Ugumu wa juu, thamani nzuri ya bei, inafaa kwa spana, koleo, na bisibisi za matumizi ya kawaida. Kasoro ni kutu rahisi, inahitaji kuwekwa mahali pakavu.
• Chuma cha Chrome-Vanadium (Cr-V): Nguvu na unyumbulifu wa kutosha, ni nyenzo kuu ya zana za mkono za kiwango cha kati hadi cha juu, inastahimili uchakavu na kutu zaidi kuliko chuma cha kaboni.
• Chuma kisichotu (Stainless Steel): Kinga bora zaidi dhidi ya kutu, inafaa kwa mazingira yenye unyevu au kemikali, lakini ugumu ni wa chini kidogo, haifai kwa hali za torque ya juu.
• Alumini (Aluminum Alloy): Nyepesi, inafaa kwa vipimo vya usawa na spana za kurekebisha ambapo uzito mdogo unahitajika.
Ushauri wa ununuzi: Kwa matumizi ya kawaida kwenye eneo la ujenzi, Chrome-Vanadium (Cr-V) inatoa thamani bora zaidi; kwa mazingira yenye unyevu (kama pwani, ujenzi wa mabomba) chagua chuma kisichotu kwanza.
helpCenter.tools_q2: Vigezo gani vya kuzingatia ili kuhakikisha ubora wa zana za mkono?
helpCenter.tools_a2:
Sifa kuu za zana bora:
• Usindikaji wa uso: Zana nzuri ina uso laini, safu ya kupakwa (chrome ya matte au chrome inayong'aa) ni sawa, na inahisi laini mkononi.
• Usahihi wa mdomo: Vipimo vya spana na soketi ni sahihi, vinakaa imara kwenye bolti bila kutikisika.
• Mshiko: Mshiko wa plastiki ya rangi mbili unaoshikamana vizuri na hauongezi uchovu katika matumizi ya muda mrefu.
• Alama ya ugumu: Bidhaa rasmi huonyesha thamani ya ugumu (mfano HRC 40-48) na nyenzo (mfano Cr-V) kwenye kichwa cha zana.
• Muhuri wa chapa: Jina la chapa lililo wazi na alama za vipimo ni dhamana ya msingi ya ubora.
Zana zilizochaguliwa kwenye jukwaa zinatoka kwa viwanda vilivyopitia ukaguzi wa sifa. Ukurasa wa vipimo unaonyesha nyenzo na taarifa za ugumu kwa urahisi wa kulinganisha.
helpCenter.tools_q3: Jinsi ya kuthibitisha utangamano wa vifaa vya zana za umeme (drill bits, saw blades, n.k.)?
helpCenter.tools_a3:
Angalia vigezo vitatu muhimu:
• Aina ya kiunganishi: Kwa drill bits angalia aina ya shina (shina la mviringo/shina la pembe sita/SDS-plus), kwa saw blades angalia kipenyo cha tundu la ufungaji na kipenyo cha nje.
• Ulinganifu wa nguvu: Kasi ya juu zaidi iliyoonyeshwa kwenye kifaa lazima isiwe chini ya kasi ya zana ya umeme isiyo na mzigo.
• Nyenzo na matumizi: Drill bits zinagawanywa kwa matumizi ya chuma (HSS — chuma cha kasi ya juu), saruji (kichwa cha alloy ngumu), na mbao (drill ya mbao) — hazipaswi kuchanganywa.
Kabla ya kununua, thibitisha chapa na modeli ya zana yako ya umeme. Timu ya huduma kwa wateja wa jukwaa inaweza kusaidia kuthibitisha utangamano.
helpCenter.tools_q4: Seti ya zana au kununua kipande kimoja — ipi ni ya faida zaidi?
helpCenter.tools_a4:
Seti kwa kawaida ni nafuu kwa 20%-35% kuliko jumla ya vipande vya peke yake, na zinakuja na sanduku la kuhifadhi kwa urahisi wa usimamizi. Zinafaa kwa hali zifuatazo:
• Vifaa vya msingi kwa eneo jipya la ujenzi au mradi
• Vifaa vya kawaida kwa timu za matengenezo
Ikiwa unahitaji kuongeza vipimo maalum (mfano soketi ya ukubwa fulani), kununua kipande kimoja ni rahisi zaidi.
helpCenter.tools_q5: Bidhaa za zana hufungashwa vipi kwa kawaida?
helpCenter.tools_a5:
Njia za kawaida za kufungasha aina tofauti za zana:
• Zana moja: Ufungashaji wa plastiki ya blister au mfuko wa plastiki, ndani ya sanduku la kadibodi, kuzuia mgongano wakati wa usafirishaji.
• Seti za zana: Sanduku la kuhifadhi la plastiki ya blow-mold + sanduku la kadibodi la nje, kila zana ina nafasi yake maalum ya kushikilia ndani ya sanduku kwa urahisi wa usimamizi kwenye eneo la kazi.
• Usafirishaji wa bahari: Viwanda hutumia masanduku ya kadibodi yenye tabaka tano na filamu ya kufunga kuzuia unyevu, kuhakikisha usalama wa usafirishaji wa masafa marefu.
Jukwaa hukagua ufungashaji kabla ya kutuma ili kuhakikisha unakidhi viwango vya usafirishaji wa kimataifa.
helpCenter.tools_q6: Jinsi ya kutathmini usahihi wa vifaa vya kupimia (futi tepu, vipimo vya usawa, n.k.)?
helpCenter.tools_a6:
• Futi tepu: Zingatia alama ya daraja la usahihi (Class I au Class II), Class I ina usahihi zaidi. Futi tepu nzuri ina ukanda wa ugumu wa wastani, inaweza kutolewa mita 2 bila kupinda, na alama za kipimo zilizochapishwa kwa uwazi.
• Kipimo cha usawa (Level): Muhimu zaidi ni usahihi wa bomba la kiputo — kipimo cha usawa bora kinakuwa na kiputo kilichokatikati kwa usawa na wima, na kisomo hakibadiliki baada ya kugeuza nyuso 180°. Sura ya alumini inapaswa kuwa sawa bila kupinda.
• Kipimo cha leza (Laser Distance Meter): Zingatia usahihi uliowekwa (kawaida ±1.5mm hadi ±2mm) na kiwango cha kupimia. Kwa matumizi ya nje, chagua aina yenye hali ya kuimarisha leza.
helpCenter.tools_q7: Nini cha kuzingatia unapochagua vifaa vya kusagia na kukata (grinding wheels, cutting discs, n.k.)?
helpCenter.tools_a7:
• Diski za kukata/grinding wheels lazima uthibitishe alama ya kasi ya juu zaidi — kasi ya matumizi haipaswi kuzidi thamani iliyoonyeshwa. Hii ni kiwango cha chini cha usalama.
• Chagua kulingana na nyenzo inayosindikwa: diski za resin kwa kukata chuma, saw blades za diamond kwa kukata jiwe/saruji, na flap discs kwa kupiga mswaki.
• Kipenyo cha nje na tundu la ufungaji lazima vilingane na grinder yako ya pembe (vipimo vya kawaida vya kipenyo cha nje: 100mm/125mm/180mm).
• Mahitaji ya kuhifadhi: Grinding wheels zinaathiriwa na unyevu, zinahitaji kuwekwa gorofa ili kuepuka kupinda kwa shinikizo, na kwa kawaida zina muda wa matumizi wa miaka 3 tangu tarehe ya uzalishaji.
helpCenter.tools_q8: Jinsi ya kuchagua kati ya zana za hewa (pneumatic) na zana za umeme?
helpCenter.tools_a8:
Ulinganisho:
• Zana za hewa (Pneumatic): Zinahitaji compressor ya hewa, gharama ya mashine moja ni ya chini, nguvu kubwa, maisha marefu, na hazishindwi na mzigo mkubwa. Zinafaa kwa warsha za kiwanda, karakana za magari na mahali penye chanzo cha hewa kisichobadilika.
• Zana za umeme: Chomeka na utumie, rahisi kubeba. Zinafaa kwa eneo la ujenzi na kazi zilizotawanyika.
• Ushauri wa kuchagua: Ikiwa eneo la kazi ni la kudumu na matumizi ni mengi (mfano kufunga bolti kwenye mstari wa uzalishaji), zana za hewa zina ufanisi zaidi na gharama ya chini; ikiwa eneo la kazi linatawanyika au linahitaji uhamaji (mfano eneo la ukarabati), zana za umeme ni rahisi zaidi.
helpCenter.safety_subtitle: Vifaa vya Kinga Binafsi (PPE) na vifaa vya usalama — uchaguzi na viwango
helpCenter.safety_q1: Kofia za usalama zina viwango gani? Jinsi ya kuchagua?
helpCenter.safety_a1:
Viwango vikuu vya kimataifa:
• EN 397 (Kiwango cha Ulaya): Kustahimili mgongano na kuchomwa, ni kiwango kinachotumika zaidi katika Afrika Mashariki.
• ANSI Z89.1 (Kiwango cha Marekani): Imegawanywa kuwa Type I (kinga ya juu) na Type II (kinga ya juu + kinga ya pembeni).
Mambo ya kuzingatia:
• Nyenzo: ABS ndiyo inayotumika zaidi, thamani nzuri ya bei; PE inastahimili kemikali zaidi; fiberglass inastahimili joto.
• Mfumo wa kusimamisha: Chagua aina ya pointi 6 au 8 kwa utulivu na starehe bora zaidi.
• Vipengele vya ziada: Kama unahitaji tundu la viziera, viunganishi vya kinga ya masikio, au vipande vinavyoakisi mwanga.
Kumbuka: Kofia za usalama zina muda wa matumizi — nyenzo ya ABS kwa kawaida ni miaka 3 tangu tarehe ya uzalishaji.
helpCenter.safety_q2: Kuna nyenzo nyingi za glavu za kinga — jinsi ya kuchagua kulingana na hali ya kazi?
helpCenter.safety_a2:
Nyenzo za kawaida na hali zinazofaa:
• Glavu za mpira/latex: Zinakinga maji na kemikali, zinafaa kwa usafi na shughuli za kemikali.
• Glavu za nitrile: Zinastahimili mafuta na asidi/alkali, zinafaa kwa matengenezo ya mitambo na kazi za rangi.
• Glavu za PU (PU-coated palm): Nyembamba na rahisi kutumia, zinafaa kwa kuunganisha vifaa vya elektroniki na kazi za usahihi.
• Glavu za ngozi ya ng'ombe: Zinastahimili uchakavu na joto la juu, zinafaa kwa kuchomea na kubeba vifaa vikali.
• Glavu za kupinga kukatwa: Zilizosokotwa kwa HPPE au waya wa chuma, zimepimwa kwa kiwango cha EN 388 kutoka A hadi F (A ni cha chini zaidi, F cha juu zaidi). Kwa kazi ya chuma bapa, kiwango cha C au zaidi kinapendekezwa.
Kabla ya kununua, tambua hatari kuu katika mazingira yako ya kazi (kukatwa/kuungua/kemikali/umeme), kisha linganisha nyenzo inayofaa.
helpCenter.safety_q3: Jinsi ya kutathmini daraja na ubora wa viatu vya usalama?
helpCenter.safety_a3:
Vidaraja kulingana na kiwango cha EN ISO 20345:
• SB: Kinga ya msingi dhidi ya kupigwa (kichwa cha chuma kinachostahimili mgongano wa 200J)
• S1: Kupinga kupigwa + kupinga umeme tuli + kisigino kinachofyonza nishati
• S1P: S1 + soli ya kati inayokinga kuchomwa
• S3: S1P + uso wa juu unaokinga maji + soli ya chini isiyoteleza
Kwa eneo la ujenzi, angalau S1P (kinga ya kupigwa + kuchomwa) inapendekezwa; kwa mazingira yenye unyevu chagua S3.
Tathmini ya ubora:
• Sehemu ya vidole inapaswa isipinde kwa wazi inapobanwa
• Soli ya chini inarudi nyuma baada ya kupinda, bila nyufa
• Ushonaji wa ndani ni sawa, bila nyuzi zilizo wazi
• Kina cha muundo wa soli ya chini kinatosha (kinaathiri uwezo wa kuzuia kuteleza)
helpCenter.safety_q4: Vidaraja vya vazi la kuakisi mwanga vinagawanywaje?
helpCenter.safety_a4:
Kulingana na EN ISO 20471, kuna vidaraja vitatu:
• Class 1: Uonekano wa chini zaidi, inafaa kwa maeneo ya hatari ndogo (mfano ndani ya ghala)
• Class 2: Uonekano wa wastani, inafaa kwa maeneo yenye magari ya wastani (mfano maeneo ya kuegesha)
• Class 3: Uonekano wa juu zaidi, inafaa kwa barabara kuu, kazi za usiku na hali nyingine za hatari kubwa
Daraja la juu lina eneo kubwa zaidi la kitambaa cha rangi ya fluorescent na vipande vya kuakisi. Kwa kazi za barabarani Afrika Mashariki, Class 2 au zaidi inapendekezwa. Upana wa vipande vya kuakisi uwe angalau 50mm, na aina ya microprism inapendekezwa (inayoakisi vizuri zaidi kuliko aina ya shanga za kioo).
helpCenter.safety_q5: Tofauti kati ya barakoa ya vumbi na kifaa cha kupinga sumu ni nini?
helpCenter.safety_a5:
• Barakoa ya vumbi (FFP series): Inachuja chembechembe ngumu na erosoli ya maji pekee. FFP1 inachuja 80%, FFP2 inachuja 94%, FFP3 inachuja 99%. Inafaa kwa vumbi, kupiga mswaki na kuchanganya saruji.
• Kifaa cha kupinga sumu (half-mask/full-face mask): Kinachuja mvuke wa kikaboni na gesi ya asidi kupitia cartridge zinazobadilishwa. Kinafaa kwa kupuliza rangi na shughuli za kemikali.
Tofauti kuu: Barakoa ya vumbi haiwezi kukinga gesi zenye sumu. Katika kazi zinazohusisha rangi, vimumunyisho au kemikali, lazima utumie kifaa cha kupinga sumu.
helpCenter.safety_q6: Vigezo gani vya kuzingatia unapochagua kamera za usalama?
helpCenter.safety_a6:
Vigezo muhimu:
• Azimio (Resolution): Pikseli milioni 2 (1080P) ni msingi, pikseli milioni 4 (2K) zinaweza kuonyesha maelezo ya uso.
• Uwezo wa kuona usiku: Umbali wa infrared (kawaida 30m/50m/80m). Ikiwezekana, chagua aina ya rangi kamili usiku.
• Daraja la kinga: Kwa nje lazima IP66 au zaidi (kinga ya mvua kubwa na vumbi). Kwa sababu ya vumbi vingi Afrika Mashariki, IP67 inapendekezwa.
• Njia ya kuhifadhi: Kifaa cha kurekodi cha diski kuu cha ndani (NVR) ni imara zaidi; uhifadhi wa wingu unahitaji kuzingatia hali ya mtandao.
• Nishati: POE ya kawaida ni rahisi zaidi — kebo moja ya mtandao inasafirisha data na nishati kwa wakati mmoja.
helpCenter.safety_q7: Jinsi ya kuchagua vifaa vya kuzima moto (vizima moto, n.k.)?
helpCenter.safety_a7:
Chagua kulingana na aina ya moto:
• Aina A (moto wa vitu vigumu: mbao, karatasi): Kizima moto cha maji au kizima moto cha unga ABC
• Aina B (moto wa vimiminika: mafuta, vimumunyisho): Kizima moto cha povu au kizima moto cha CO₂
• Aina C (moto wa gesi): Kizima moto cha unga
• Aina E (moto wa umeme): Kizima moto cha CO₂ (hakipitishi umeme, hakiharibu vifaa)
Kwa eneo la ujenzi, kizima moto cha unga ABC kinapendekezwa (matumizi mengi zaidi). Kwa chumba cha vifaa vya umeme, tumia CO₂. Kumbuka kukagua kuwa sindano ya kipimo cha shinikizo iko kwenye eneo la kijani — kizima moto kilichoisha muda wake kinahitaji ukaguzi au kubadilishwa.
helpCenter.safety_q8: Vifaa vya kinga vina muda wa matumizi? Jinsi ya kuthibitisha hali nzuri ya bidhaa?
helpCenter.safety_a8:
Muda wa matumizi wa bidhaa kuu za kinga:
• Kofia za usalama: Nyenzo ya ABS miaka 3, nyenzo ya PE miaka 2 (tangu tarehe ya uzalishaji), cheti cha ubora kinaambatanishwa ndani ya kifungashio.
• Viatu vya usalama: Maisha ya kawaida ya matumizi ni miaka 1-2; soli ya mpira ikibaki na unyumbulifu inaonyesha hali nzuri.
• Glavu za kinga: Glavu za latex/nitrile zina muda wa matumizi wa miaka 3; zihifadhiwe kwenye kifungashio kilichofungwa.
• Vizima moto: Kizima moto cha unga kina muda wa matumizi wa miaka 5-8; sindano ya kipimo cha shinikizo ikiwa kwenye eneo la kijani inaonyesha hali ya kawaida.
Jukwaa hukagua tarehe ya uzalishaji upande wa ununuzi ili kuhakikisha bidhaa zinazotumwa ziko ndani ya muda wa matumizi.
helpCenter.fasteners_subtitle: Bolti, nati, skrubu, vifungo vya nanga, na sealant — uchaguzi na utambuzi
helpCenter.fasteners_q1: Daraja la nguvu la bolti (mfano 4.8, 8.8, 10.9) linamaanisha nini? Jinsi ya kuchagua?
helpCenter.fasteners_a1:
Alama ya daraja la nguvu iko kwenye kichwa cha bolti:
• Nambari kabla ya nukta × 100 = nguvu ya uvutaji (MPa). Mfano, daraja 8.8 lina nguvu ya uvutaji ≥ 800MPa
• Nambari baada ya nukta × 10 = uwiano wa nguvu ya kusalimu amri (%). Yaani nguvu ya kusalimu amri ni 80% ya nguvu ya uvutaji
Uchaguzi wa kawaida:
• Daraja 4.8: Viunganishi vya kawaida, kama reli za kinga na miundo nyepesi
• Daraja 8.8: Viunganishi vya nguvu ya kati hadi ya juu, kama miundo ya chuma na vifaa vya mitambo — matumizi mengi zaidi
• Daraja 10.9: Viunganishi vya nguvu ya juu, kama madaraja na vifaa vizito
• Daraja 12.9: Nguvu ya juu sana, kwa miradi maalum
Kwa eneo la ujenzi la kawaida, daraja 8.8 linatosha kwa mahitaji mengi. Miundo ya chuma ya juu au sehemu zinazobeba uzito zinahitaji daraja 10.9 kulingana na muundo.
helpCenter.fasteners_q2: Ni usindikaji gani wa uso unaofaa kwa vifungo vya nje au mazingira yenye unyevu?
helpCenter.fasteners_a2:
Ulinganisho wa usindikaji wa kawaida wa uso:
• Zinc Plated (kupakwa zinki): Kinga ya msingi dhidi ya kutu, gharama ya chini, inafaa kwa ndani na nje kwa muda mfupi.
• Hot-Dip Galvanized (kuzamishwa kwenye zinki ya moto): Safu nene ya zinki, kinga kali dhidi ya kutu, inafaa kwa nje kwa muda mrefu na maeneo ya pwani.
• Dacromet: Hakuna hatari ya hydrogen embrittlement, kinga dhidi ya kutu ni bora kuliko zinc plating, inafaa kwa bolti za nguvu ya juu (daraja 10.9 na zaidi).
• Chuma kisichotu (A2/304, A4/316): Kinga bora zaidi dhidi ya kutu. A4/316 inafaa kwa mazingira yanayogusana na maji ya bahari, lakini gharama ni ya juu zaidi.
Kwa miji ya pwani ya Afrika Mashariki (kama Dar es Salaam) yenye unyevu wa juu na upepo wa chumvi, vifungo vya nje vinapaswa kuwa angalau hot-dip galvanized au stainless steel 304.
helpCenter.fasteners_q3: Tofauti kati ya skrubu za self-tapping na self-drilling ni nini?
helpCenter.fasteners_a3:
• Skrubu za Self-Tapping: Zinahitaji tundu la awali kutengenezwa kwanza, thread hujikata yenyewe. Zinafaa kwa chuma nyembamba, plastiki, na mbao.
• Skrubu za Self-Drilling (pia huitwa TEK screws): Zina drill bit kwenye ncha, hazihitaji tundu la awali, zinaweza kupenya chuma moja kwa moja. Zinafaa kwa bati za rangi na miundo nyepesi ya chuma, ufanisi mkubwa wa ujenzi.
Jambo muhimu la kuchagua: Chagua urefu unaofaa wa drill na umbali wa thread kulingana na unene wa chuma kinachounganishwa. Kwa chuma chenye unene > 5mm, panapendekezwa kutengeneza tundu kwanza na kutumia bolti za kawaida badala ya skrubu za self-drilling.
helpCenter.fasteners_q4: Jinsi ya kuchagua bolti za expansion/anchor bolts? Ukubwa wa tundu unalingana vipi?
helpCenter.fasteners_a4:
• Bolti za expansion za chuma: Zinajibanisha kwa kubana ukuta wa tundu, uwezo mkubwa wa kubeba mzigo, zinafaa kwa saruji na ukuta wa matofali imara.
• Plugi za plastiki za expansion + skrubu: Uwezo mdogo wa kubeba mzigo, zinafaa kwa matofali ya mashimo na kuta nyepesi.
• Chemical anchor bolts: Zinashikilia kwa kemikali ya gundi, uwezo mkubwa zaidi wa kubeba mzigo, zinafaa kwa facade za curtain wall na misingi ya vifaa.
Uhusiano wa ukubwa wa tundu (kwa mfumo wa metric):
• Bolti ya expansion M6 → Kipenyo cha tundu 8mm
• Bolti ya expansion M8 → Kipenyo cha tundu 10mm
• Bolti ya expansion M10 → Kipenyo cha tundu 12mm
• Bolti ya expansion M12 → Kipenyo cha tundu 16mm
Kina cha tundu kinapaswa kuwa 10-15mm zaidi ya urefu wa plugi ya expansion. Safisha vumbi ndani ya tundu kabla ya kufunga.
helpCenter.fasteners_q5: Kuna aina ngapi za sealant? Zinafaa kwa hali gani?
helpCenter.fasteners_a5:
Aina za kawaida:
• Silicone sealant (gundi ya kioo): Unyumbulifu mzuri na kustahimili hali ya hewa, inafaa kwa mipaka ya madirisha na milango, kuzuia maji bafuni, na mipaka ya curtain wall. Imegawanywa kuwa asidi (inashikamana vizuri lakini inashambulia chuma) na neutral (salama kwa matumizi ya jumla).
• Polyurethane sealant: Ugumu wa juu, inaweza kupakwa rangi, inafaa kwa mipaka ya kupanuka ya saruji na mipaka ya sakafu.
• MS modified silicone: Utendaji bora wa jumla, haina vimumunyisho, inaweza kupakwa rangi, rafiki wa mazingira, inafaa kwa majengo ya kiwango cha juu.
• Butyl sealant: Haigandi kamwe, inashikilia kila wakati, inafaa kwa sehemu za kuingiliana za paa za chuma.
Kwa ujumla, sealant ya silicone ya neutral inatosha kwa milango na madirisha ya majengo; kwa mipaka ya saruji/sakafu tumia polyurethane; kwa paa za chuma tumia butyl.
helpCenter.fasteners_q6: Jinsi ya kuchagua vifungo bora kupitia vigezo na alama?
helpCenter.fasteners_a6:
Alama muhimu za kuzingatia unapochagua:
• Alama ya daraja la nguvu: Bolti rasmi zina alama ya daraja (mfano 8.8, 10.9) na alama ya mtengenezaji iliyochongwa kwenye kichwa — hii ni dhamana ya msingi ya ubora.
• Ubora wa thread: Thread bora ni laini na sawa, umbo la jino ni wazi na thabiti.
• Usindikaji wa uso: Safu ya kupakwa ni sawa na ina mng'ao, ikionyesha mchakato mzuri wa kupinga kutu.
• Usahihi wa vipimo: Bidhaa rasmi zina tolerance ndogo — bolti ya M8 ina kipenyo kilichodhibitiwa kwa usahihi wa 8mm±0.2mm.
• Nyaraka za kusindikiza: Kwa ununuzi wa wingi, unaweza kuomba ripoti ya nyenzo na ripoti ya majaribio ya utendaji wa mitambo.
Viwanda vya vifungo vinavyoshirikiana na jukwaa vina mfumo kamili wa ukaguzi wa ubora. Ukurasa wa maelezo ya bidhaa unaonyesha nyenzo na daraja la nguvu kwa urahisi wa kuchagua kulingana na mahitaji yako.
helpCenter.fasteners_q7: Vipimo vya kawaida vya kufungasha vifungo ni vipi? Jinsi ya kukokotoa kiasi cha ununuzi?
helpCenter.fasteners_a7:
Vipimo vya kawaida vya kufungasha:
• Vipimo vidogo (M4-M10): Kwa uzito (kilogramu) au idadi (mia/elfu) kwenye masanduku madogo, kisha kwenye masanduku ya kadibodi.
• Vipimo vikubwa (M12 na zaidi): Kwa idadi kwenye kifungashio cha pekee au mifuko ya kusuka.
• Bolti za nguvu ya juu: Kufungashwa peke yake kwa karatasi yenye mafuta, kulinda thread na safu ya kupakwa.
Ushauri wa kiasi cha ununuzi:
• Ongeza 5%-10% juu ya BOM (orodha ya vifaa) ili kuepuka kuagiza tena kwa sababu ya hasara.
• Vifungo vidogo vinafaidika zaidi kununuliwa kwa kilogramu.
• Ununuzi wa vipimo mchanganyiko kwa wakati mmoja unaweza kupata mpango bora wa ununuzi.
Wakati wa kuwasilisha ombi la bei, andika vipimo na kiasi maalum — jukwaa litakupendekeza mpango wa ununuzi wa kiuchumi zaidi.
helpCenter.fasteners_q8: Jinsi ya kuchagua kati ya bolti za chuma kisichotu na bolti za chuma cha kaboni zilizopakwa zinki?
helpCenter.fasteners_a8:
Ulinganisho:
• Chuma cha kaboni kilichopakwa zinki: Nguvu ya juu (kuna daraja 8.8/10.9/12.9), safu ya zinki ikiharibika itaanza kutu. Inafaa kwa ndani au miundo yenye safu ya kinga ya rangi.
• Chuma kisichotu 304 (A2): Kinga nzuri dhidi ya kutu, lakini nguvu ya juu ni sawa tu na daraja 5.6 la chuma cha kaboni (takriban 500MPa). Inafaa kwa viunganishi vya kawaida katika maeneo ya pwani.
• Chuma kisichotu 316 (A4): Kinastahimili kutu ya maji ya bahari, kinafaa kwa bandari, viwanda vya kemikali na mazingira mengine yenye kutu kali. Bei ni ya juu zaidi.
Kumbuka: Bolti za chuma kisichotu na nati za chuma cha kaboni hazipaswi kuchanganywa (kutu ya elektrokemia). Tumia nyenzo sawa kwa zote mbili.
helpCenter.electrical_title: Udhibiti wa Viwanda na Usambazaji Umeme
helpCenter.electrical_subtitle: Kebo, taa, sanduku za usambazaji, mabomba ya waya, na swichi — uchaguzi na usalama
helpCenter.electrical_q1: Jinsi ya kuchagua ukubwa wa kebo kulingana na mzigo?
helpCenter.electrical_a1:
Uwezo wa kubeba mkondo kwa usalama wa kebo za shaba za 220V za awamu moja:
• 1.5mm²: Takriban 10-15A, inafaa kwa mzunguko wa taa
• 2.5mm²: Takriban 16-25A, inafaa kwa soketi za kawaida
• 4mm²: Takriban 25-35A, inafaa kwa vifaa vya nguvu kubwa kama viyoyozi na hita za maji
• 6mm²: Takriban 32-45A, inafaa kwa waya kuu ya kuingia nyumbani
• 10mm²: Takriban 45-65A, inafaa kwa waya ya kuingilia sanduku ndogo la usambazaji
Kanuni ya kuchagua: Kwanza kokotoa mkondo wa jumla wa mzigo (nguvu ÷ voltage), kisha chagua kebo kulingana na jedwali la kubeba mkondo, ukiacha nafasi ya 20%-30%. Kwa umbali mrefu (>50m), ongeza ukubwa kwa hatua moja ili kufidia upungufu wa voltage.
helpCenter.electrical_q2: Tofauti kati ya waya ya BV na BVR ni nini?
helpCenter.electrical_a2:
• BV (waya ngumu ya nyuzi moja): Kondakta moja imara ya shaba, inafaa kwa uwekaji wa waya uliofichwa ndani ya ukuta (kupitia bomba). Haipindiki tena kwa urahisi baada ya kupindwa, lakini viunganishi ni imara zaidi.
• BVR (waya laini ya nyuzi nyingi): Nyuzi nyembamba nyingi za shaba zilizosokotwa pamoja, laini na rahisi kupinda. Inafaa kwa hali zinazohitaji uhamaji au kupinda mara kwa mara (uwekaji waya ndani ya sanduku la usambazaji, mzunguko wa muda).
Kwa uwekaji waya uliofichwa ndani ya ukuta katika nyumba na majengo, waya ya BV ndiyo inayotumika zaidi; kwa uwekaji waya wa sekondari ndani ya sanduku la usambazaji, BVR ni rahisi zaidi.
helpCenter.electrical_q3: Jinsi ya kutathmini ubora wa taa za LED?
helpCenter.electrical_a3:
Vigezo muhimu:
• Ufanisi wa mwanga (lm/W): Inaonyesha lumeni ngapi za mwanga zinazozalishwa kwa kila wati. Taa bora za LED zina ufanisi wa >100lm/W; chini ya 80lm/W ni za kiwango cha chini.
• Halijoto ya rangi: 3000K mwanga wa manjano joto (makazi), 4000K mwanga mweupe wa asili (ofisi), 6500K mwanga mweupe baridi (warsha za kiwanda).
• Faharasa ya Uthibitisho wa Rangi (CRI/Ra): Ra>80 ni ya kutosha, Ra>90 inafaa kwa maeneo yanayohitaji kutofautisha rangi.
• Chanzo cha umeme: Taa bora za LED hutumia dereva ya kudumu ya mkondo iliyotengwa, maisha ya saa 30,000-50,000. Taa za bei nafuu hutumia kupunguza voltage kwa capacitor, zenye mtetemo unaoonekana na maisha mafupi.
• Muundo wa kuondoa joto: Bodi ya alumini + kifaa cha kuondoa joto cha alumini ni bora kuliko shell ya plastiki — halijoto ya chini inaongeza maisha ya LED.
helpCenter.electrical_q4: Nini cha kuzingatia unapochagua sanduku la usambazaji umeme?
helpCenter.electrical_a4:
• Idadi ya mizunguko: Acha nafasi ya 20%-30% zaidi ya mizunguko halisi (kwa kuongeza mizunguko baadaye).
• Nyenzo ya sanduku: Kwa ndani tumia chuma cha cold-rolled kilichopakwa rangi ya poda; kwa nje/mazingira yenye unyevu tumia chuma kisichotu 304 au SMC fiberglass.
• Daraja la kinga: Kwa ndani IP30-IP44 inatosha; kwa nje angalau IP55; kwa warsha zenye vumbi IP65.
• Njia ya kuingilia waya: Juu-kuingia-juu-kutoka au chini-kuingia-chini-kutoka, kulingana na mpangilio wa waya kwenye eneo.
• Uchaguzi wa swichi: Swichi kuu tumia MCCB (Moulded Case Circuit Breaker); mizunguko ya matawi tumia MCB (Miniature Circuit Breaker) + kinga dhidi ya mkondo wa uvujaji.
• Uwezo wa kubeba mkondo wa baa ya shaba: Lazima ulingane na mkondo wa jumla wa kuingilia, usitazame tu ukubwa wa swichi.
helpCenter.electrical_q5: Mabomba ya waya — PVC au ya chuma?
helpCenter.electrical_a5:
• Bomba la PVC: Nyepesi, kinga nzuri ya umeme, kustahimili kutu, inafaa kwa uwekaji uliofichwa ndani ya ukuta. Kasoro ni kutostahimili joto la juu na nguvu ndogo ya kustahimili shinikizo.
• Bomba la chuma kilichopakwa zinki (JDG/KBG): Nguvu ya juu, utendaji mzuri wa kupinga moto, inafaa kwa uwekaji unaoonekana na mahali panapohitaji kinga ya mitambo. JDG (aina ya kubana) ina unene zaidi wa ukuta; KBG (aina ya kubana) ina ukuta mwembamba lakini ujenzi ni wa haraka zaidi.
• Bomba la chuma kisichotu la wimbi: Unyumbulifu mzuri, inafaa kwa sehemu za kuunganisha vifaa na maeneo yenye kupinda mengi.
Kwa uwekaji wa ndani ya ukuta katika nyumba, PVC inatosha. Kwa uwekaji unaoonekana katika majengo ya biashara na mzunguko wa kuzima moto, mabomba ya chuma ni lazima.
helpCenter.electrical_q6: Nini cha kuzingatia unapochagua swichi na soketi?
helpCenter.electrical_a6:
• Mkondo wa kiwango: Swichi ya kawaida 10A inatosha; kwa vifaa vya nguvu kubwa (viyoyozi, hita za maji) soketi maalum ya 16A au 20A inahitajika.
• Nyenzo ya sehemu ya kugusana: Sehemu za kugusana za alloy ya fedha (AgCdO au AgNi) zinapitisha umeme vizuri na zina maisha marefu; sehemu za shaba zinaoksidisha kwa urahisi.
• Nyenzo ya shell: Bidhaa bora hutumia PC (polycarbonate) — inazuia moto, haibadilishi rangi. Bidhaa duni hutumia urea resin ambayo inakuwa ya manjano na dhaifu.
• Vyeti vya usalama: Angalia kama bidhaa imeidhinishwa na soko lengwa.
• Jaribio la kugusa: Swichi nzuri ina hisi ya kubonyeza iliyo wazi na thabiti; bidhaa duni ni huru na hazirudi vizuri.
helpCenter.electrical_q7: Nini cha kuzingatia unaponunua bidhaa za udhibiti wa viwanda (circuit breakers, contactors, relays)?
helpCenter.electrical_a7:
• Ulinganifu wa vigezo vya kiwango: Mkondo wa kiwango na uwezo wa kukata wa circuit breaker lazima usiwe chini ya mahitaji ya mzunguko. Mkondo wa kiwango wa contactor unapaswa kuwa zaidi ya mara 1.25 ya mkondo wa kiwango wa motor inayodhibitiwa.
• Uthabiti wa chapa: Ndani ya sanduku moja la usambazaji, inapendekezwa kutumia bidhaa za chapa moja — vifaa vya ziada (auxiliary contacts, under-voltage trip devices) vinaendana vizuri zaidi.
• Msimbo wa modeli: Modeli ya bidhaa ya udhibiti wa viwanda inaamua vipimo na mchanganyiko wa utendaji. Wakati wa ununuzi, lazima uthibitishe modeli kamili, usiangalie mkondo wa kiwango pekee.
• Uthibitishaji wa ukweli: Bidhaa za chapa maarufu zote hutoa nambari za kuthibitisha ukweli. Kabla ya ununuzi wa wingi, hakikisha kuthibitisha.
helpCenter.electrical_q8: Jinsi ya kuthibitisha ubora wa kebo na waya unaponunua?
helpCenter.electrical_a8:
Viashiria vya ubora vya kuzingatia:
• Vipimo vya kufungasha: Waya za nyumbani (BV/BVR) kwa kawaida ni mita 100/roll, kila roll ina lebo ya cheti cha ubora inayoonyesha vipimo, urefu, na tarehe ya uzalishaji.
• Ubora wa safu ya kinga: Kebo bora ina safu ya kinga yenye unene sawa na rangi thabiti, maandishi yaliyo wazi. Inapopindwa inapaswa kuwa laini bila kuwa nyeupe.
• Ubora wa shaba: Kondakta ya shaba safi ina rangi ya zambarau inayong'aa kwenye sehemu ya msalaba, utendaji bora wa kupitisha umeme.
• Urefu wa kutosha: Bidhaa rasmi zina tofauti ya urefu isiyozidi ±0.5%.
• Alama za vyeti: Bidhaa inapaswa kuwa na vipimo kamili vya modeli na taarifa za mtengenezaji.
Kebo zinazotolewa na jukwaa zinatoka kwa viwanda vilivyo na sifa kamili. Ukurasa wa vipimo unaonyesha maelezo kamili ili uweze kulinganisha na kuchagua kulingana na mahitaji yako.
helpCenter.doors_subtitle: Milango na madirisha, mabomba ya maji, na keramiki za bafuni — uchaguzi na tathmini ya ubora
helpCenter.doors_q1: Jinsi ya kuchagua profaili za milango na madirisha (alumini/PVC)?
helpCenter.doors_a1:
• Milango na madirisha ya alumini: Nguvu ya juu, haipinduki kwa urahisi, maisha marefu — ndiyo inayotumika zaidi katika majengo ya biashara na makazi ya kiwango cha kati hadi cha juu. Zingatia unene wa ukuta: profaili kuu ya dirisha la nje inapaswa kuwa ≥1.4mm (kiwango kipya ≥1.8mm) — chini ya hii nguvu haitoshi.
• Milango na madirisha ya PVC-U (plastiki): Kinga bora ya joto kuliko alumini, bei ya chini. Inafaa kwa maeneo yenye tofauti kubwa ya joto lakini shinikizo la upepo si kubwa. Kasoro ni uwezo mdogo wa kustahimili mionzi ya UV — mfiduo wa muda mrefu husababisha kuzeeka na kubadilika rangi.
• Alumini ya thermal break: Alumini yenye kihami cha joto (PA66 nylon) katikati kinachovunja daraja la joto, ikichanganya nguvu ya alumini na uwezo wa kuhami joto wa PVC. Chaguo la kiwango cha juu.
Hali ya hewa ya Afrika Mashariki ni ya joto na jua kali — alumini au alumini ya thermal break inapendekezwa. PVC inazeeka haraka katika maeneo yenye mionzi kali ya UV.
helpCenter.doors_q2: Nini cha kuzingatia unapochagua vyuma vya milango na madirisha (bawaba, vishikio, gurudumu)?
helpCenter.doors_a2:
Mambo muhimu ya kuchagua kwa kila aina:
• Bawaba/Hinges: Chuma kisichotu 304 kinapendekezwa. Jaribu kufungua na kufunga — inapaswa kuwa laini bila kelele. Bawaba bora zinaweza kubeba uzito wa kg 40-60.
• Vishikio (Handles): Vishikio vya zinc alloy vina uzito unaofaa na hisi nzuri mkononi. Safu ya kupakwa inapaswa kuwa laini na safi.
• Gurudumu (kwa milango/madirisha ya kusogeza): Gurudumu mbili ni imara zaidi kuliko moja. Gurudumu za bearing ni kimya zaidi na za kudumu zaidi. Chagua shell ya chuma kisichotu.
• Vipande vya kuziba (Seals): EPDM rubber ina unyumbulifu mzuri na inastahimili kuzeeka, ni bora kuliko PVC.
Vyuma bora vinapaswa kudumu mara 100,000 au zaidi za kufungua na kufunga. Ukurasa wa bidhaa kwenye jukwaa unaonyesha nyenzo na vigezo muhimu kwa urahisi wa kulinganisha kulingana na hali yako ya matumizi.
helpCenter.doors_q3: Mfereji wa maji/valve — ya shaba au chuma kisichotu?
helpCenter.doors_a3:
• Shaba (Yellow Brass H59/H62): Inayeyuka vizuri, inazuia bakteria, ni nyenzo ya jadi inayotumika zaidi. Mfereji bora wa shaba una kiwango cha shaba ≥59%, uso umepakwa chrome. Kumbuka: Mifereji duni ya shaba ina kiwango cha juu cha risasi — chagua bidhaa zilizo na alama ya "risasi ya chini" au zilizoidhinishwa na NSF.
• Chuma kisichotu (304): Hakuna risasi, kinafaa kwa afya, kustahimili kutu, lakini mchakato wa kuyeyusha ni mgumu na chaguo za muundo ni chache. Kinafaa kwa hali zinazozingatia afya na kudumu.
• Zinc alloy: Inaharibika kwa urahisi na maisha mafupi — haipendekezwi kwa mfumo wa maji ya kunywa.
Kutathmini ubora: Mfereji mzuri una uzito mkononi; uso wa chrome unapaswa kung'aa kama kioo, bila muundo wa ngozi ya chungwa.
helpCenter.doors_q4: Bomba la PPR na bomba la PVC — kila moja inatumika wapi?
helpCenter.doors_a4:
• Bomba la PPR (Polypropylene): Linastahimili joto la juu (matumizi ya muda mrefu hadi 70°C), linatumika kwa mabomba ya maji baridi na moto ndani ya nyumba. Muunganisho ni kwa kuyeyusha kwa joto — hakuna hatari ya kuvuja kwenye viunganishi.
• Bomba la PVC-U: Halistahimili joto la juu (<45°C), linatumika kwa mabomba ya maji machafu, mabomba ya mvua, na mabomba ya kupitisha waya. Muunganisho ni kwa gundi. Bei ni ya chini kuliko PPR.
• Bomba la PE: Unyumbulifu mzuri na linastahimili joto la chini, kawaida linatumika kwa mabomba makuu ya maji ya nje (kwa kipenyo kikubwa zaidi).
Kanuni rahisi: Mabomba ya maji (hasa maji ya moto) tumia PPR; mabomba ya maji machafu tumia PVC; mabomba makuu ya maji ya nje tumia PE.
helpCenter.doors_q5: Jinsi ya kuchagua keramiki za bafuni (choo, beseni ya kuoshea mikono) zenye ubora?
helpCenter.doors_a5:
Mambo ya kuzingatia:
• Msongamano wa keramiki: Keramiki bora inatoa sauti ya wazi inapopigwa, uso wa glazed ni laini na una hisi ya kioo, kiwango cha chini cha kunyonya maji (<0.5%) kinaonyesha kuoka vizuri.
• Njia ya kusafisha (choo): Siphon ni kimya na inafaa kwa makazi; maji ya moja kwa moja yana nguvu na yanafaa kwa maeneo ya umma.
• Ubora wa vifaa vya maji: Valve ya kuingiza maji na valve ya kutoa maji ndani ya tanki ndizo zinazobainisha utegemewaji wa muda mrefu — chagua chapa maarufu za vifaa vya maji.
• Ulinganifu wa vipimo: Thibitisha umbali wa tundu (umbali kutoka tundu la maji hadi ukuta), kawaida ni 300mm/400mm.
Jukwaa linatoa vipimo kamili vya bidhaa na picha halisi kukusaidia kulinganisha kwa usahihi na mahitaji ya mradi wako.
helpCenter.doors_q6: Jinsi ya kuchagua vifaa vya mabomba ya maji (mikono, viunganishi vya T, valve)?
helpCenter.doors_a6:
• Nyenzo ya vifaa inapaswa kulingana na bomba: Bomba la PPR na vifaa vya PPR, bomba la chuma kisichotu na vifaa vya chuma kisichotu — kuepuka kutu ya elektrokemia.
• Vifaa vya shaba (kama ball valve, gate valve): Chagua shaba iliyotengenezwa kwa forge (si cast) — uwezo mkubwa zaidi wa kustahimili shinikizo. Uso unapaswa kuwa safi na unene wa ukuta sawa.
• Uchaguzi wa valve: Kwa kufunga/kufungua tumia ball valve (haraka na kuziba vizuri); kwa kudhibiti mtiririko tumia gate valve au globe valve; kwa kuzuia kurudi nyuma tumia check valve.
• Njia ya kuziba: Muunganisho wa thread unahitaji tepu ya PTFE; muunganisho wa flange unahitaji gasket ya mpira ya unene unaofaa.
• Daraja la shinikizo: Kwa mfumo wa maji wa nyumbani PN16 (1.6MPa) inatosha; kwa mabomba ya viwanda chagua kulingana na shinikizo la mfumo.
helpCenter.doors_q7: Jinsi ya kutathmini ubora na utendaji wa shower?
helpCenter.doors_a7:
• Nyenzo: Mwili wa shaba ni bora zaidi (nzito, kustahimili kutu). Paneli ya chuma kisichotu au ABS inafaa. Hose inapaswa kuwa ya chuma kisichotu kilichosokotwa — maisha marefu zaidi kuliko hose ya plastiki.
• Njia za kutoa maji: Shower yenye kazi nyingi (chanzo, mvua, masaji) inatoa uzoefu bora zaidi — jambo muhimu ni kama kubadilisha kati ya hali ni laini.
• Chembe za silicone za kujisafisha: Matundu ya kutoa maji yaliyotengenezwa kwa silicone hayajazibwi na chite kwa urahisi — unaweza kusafisha kwa kupapasa tu.
• Utendaji wa joto thabiti: Shower yenye valve ya joto thabiti inaweza kudumisha joto la maji kiotomatiki — bei ni ya juu lakini uzoefu ni bora, hasa kwa nyumba zenye wazee na watoto.
• Mahitaji ya shinikizo la maji: Baadhi ya vichwa vikubwa vya juu vinahitaji shinikizo la juu la maji (zaidi ya 0.15MPa). Kwa orofa za juu au shinikizo la chini la maji, thibitisha kwanza.
helpCenter.doors_q8: Jinsi ya kuchagua kufuli ya mlango? Tofauti kati ya kufuli ya mitambo na kufuli ya elektroniki ni nini?
helpCenter.doors_a8:
• Kufuli ya mitambo: Muundo rahisi na wa kuaminika, haihitaji betri/umeme. Imegawanywa kwa viwango vya usalama: Kiwango A (kufuli ya msalaba, uwezekano mkubwa wa kufunguliwa), Kiwango B (mpira wa mwezi wa safu mbili), Kiwango C (ufunguo wa sahani, kinga dhidi ya kufunguliwa kwa mbinu >dakika 270). Angalau Kiwango B kinapendekezwa.
• Kufuli ya elektroniki/smart: Njia nyingi za kufungua — alama za vidole/nenosiri/kadi/ufunguo. Urahisi mzuri, lakini zingatia: maisha ya betri (lithium bora ni miezi 6-12), na kama kuna njia ya dharura ya ufunguo wa mitambo.
• Nyenzo ya mwili wa kufuli: Chuma kisichotu 304 ni bora zaidi kwa kudumu; zinc alloy ina gharama ya chini lakini kinga dhaifu dhidi ya nguvu.
• Ulinganifu wa ufungaji: Kabla ya kununua, thibitisha unene wa mlango (kawaida 40-50mm) na vipimo vya mwili wa kufuli (urefu wa silinda, ukubwa wa shina la mraba).
helpCenter.decoration_subtitle: Vifaa vya kuzuia maji, rangi, bodi za mapambo, na vigae — uchaguzi na matumizi
helpCenter.decoration_q1: Kuna aina ngapi za vifaa vya kuzuia maji? Jinsi ya kuchagua kwa eneo tofauti?
helpCenter.decoration_a1:
Aina za kawaida na maeneo yanayofaa:
• Rangi ya polyurethane ya kuzuia maji: Unyumbulifu mzuri, inafaa kwa bafuni na jikoni na maeneo mengine ya unyevu ndani ya nyumba. Inaweza kupakwa kwenye uso wenye unyevu, inashikamana vizuri na msingi.
• Rangi ya acrylic ya kuzuia maji: Ya maji, rafiki wa mazingira na rahisi kupaka, inafaa kwa balcony, jikoni na bafuni na maeneo madogo.
• Karatasi ya SBS modified bitumen: Inatumika kwa kuzuia maji kwa eneo kubwa la paa, inastahimili joto la juu na la chini, inafaa kwa hali ya hewa ya joto ya Afrika Mashariki.
• Aina ya fuwele inayoingia kwenye saruji: Inaingia kwenye matundu madogo ya saruji na kutengeneza fuwele zinazoziba njia, inafaa kwa basement na mabwawa ya maji.
Kanuni ya ujenzi: Kuzuia maji bafuni kunapaswa kupanda kwenye ukuta angalau sm 30 (eneo la kuoga 1.8m), jaribio la kujaza maji kwa angalau masaa 24.
helpCenter.decoration_q2: Jinsi ya kuchagua rangi? Vigezo gani vya kuzingatia kwa ubora?
helpCenter.decoration_a2:
Vigezo muhimu vya kuchagua rangi:
• Uwezo wa kufunika: Rangi bora ya latex inaweza kufunika rangi ya chini kwa kupaka mara moja, ufanisi wa juu wa kazi.
• Idadi ya mara za kupangusa: Bidhaa bora >10,000 mara, kudumu zaidi.
• Viashiria vya mazingira: VOC (Volatile Organic Compounds) ndogo zaidi ni bora — rangi bora ya maji ina VOC <50g/L. Kiwango cha formaldehyde kinapaswa kuwa <50mg/kg.
• Vyeti vya mazingira: Blue Angel ya Ulaya na A+ ya Ufaransa ni vyeti vya kiwango cha juu vinavyotambuliwa.
• Hali ya kufungua: Rangi nzuri ina muundo sawa, haina mabonge, harufu ni ya wastani.
Viwanda vya rangi vinavyoshirikiana na jukwaa vinatoa ripoti kamili za ukaguzi na taarifa za vyeti vya mazingira, zinazoweza kuangaliwa moja kwa moja kwenye ukurasa wa bidhaa.
helpCenter.decoration_q3: Jinsi ya kuchagua vigae? Aina gani inafaa kwa hali gani?
helpCenter.decoration_a3:
Vigezo muhimu vya kuchagua vigae:
• Kiwango cha kunyonya maji: Vigae vya sakafu vinapaswa kuwa <0.5% (keramiki kamili), nguvu ya juu na kustahimili uchakavu; vigae vya ukuta <10% vinatosha.
• Usawa: Weka vigae viwili uso kwa uso — pengo ndogo zaidi inamaanisha usawa bora na matokeo bora ya kupanga.
• Daraja la kupinga kuteleza: Kwa maeneo yenye maji, chagua vigae vyenye mgawo wa msuguano >0.5.
• Ugumu wa glaze: Glaze bora haiachwi alama za mikwaruzo, rahisi kusafisha kila siku.
Mapendekezo kwa hali tofauti:
• Nje/Balcony: Vigae vya kupinga kuteleza, kiwango cha kunyonya maji <0.5%
• Sakafu ya bafuni: Vigae vidogo vya kupinga kuteleza (300×300mm), rahisi kutengeneza mteremko wa maji
• Sebule/Ukumbi: Vigae vya 800×800mm au 600×1200mm vya glazed kamili/marumaru
• Ukuta wa jikoni: Vigae vya glazed, rahisi kufuta mafuta
Jukwaa linapanga kulingana na vipimo na matumizi ili uweze kuchuja haraka kulingana na hali ya mradi wako.
helpCenter.decoration_q4: Tofauti kati ya bodi (plywood/MDF/bodi ya eco) ni nini?
helpCenter.decoration_a4:
• Plywood (bodi ya tabaka): Tabaka nyingi za mbao zilizobandikwa kwa msalaba kwa joto na shinikizo, nguvu ya juu, inafaa kwa fremu za samani na masanduku ya kufungasha. Imegawanywa kuwa E0/E1 (kiwango cha kutoa formaldehyde) — E0 ni rafiki zaidi kwa mazingira.
• MDF (Medium Density Fiberboard): Nyuzi za mbao zilizosagwa na kubandikwa kwa joto na shinikizo, uso laini na rahisi kusindika, inafaa kwa uso wa mapambo na milango ya kupakwa rangi. Kasoro ni kuogopa unyevu — inavimba isivyoweza kurekebishwa ikinyonya maji.
• Particle Board (bodi ya chembechembe): Chembechembe za mbao zilizobandikwa kwa joto na shinikizo, bei ya chini zaidi, nguvu na kinga dhidi ya unyevu ni duni zaidi.
• OSB (Oriented Strand Board): Nguvu ya muundo ni bora kuliko particle board ya kawaida, mara nyingi inatumika kwa kuta na sakafu za majengo.
• Eco Board (bodi isiyo na rangi): Kiini + uso wa melamine, inatumika moja kwa moja bila rangi, inafaa kwa bodi za kabati.
Jambo muhimu la kuchagua: Bainisha matumizi (sehemu ya muundo/uso wa mapambo/kabati), zingatia daraja la mazingira (E0 inapendekezwa) na kiwango cha unyevu (<14%).
helpCenter.decoration_q5: Tofauti kati ya rangi ya nje ya jengo na rangi ya latex ya ndani ni nini?
helpCenter.decoration_a5:
• Rangi ya nje: Kustahimili hali ya hewa vizuri (kupinga UV, kustahimili mvua na upepo), unyumbulifu mzuri (kukabiliana na kupanuka na kusinyaa kwa joto), na utendaji wa juu wa kupinga ukungu na mwani. Kwa jua na mvua nyingi za Afrika Mashariki, muda wa kustahimili hali ya hewa unapaswa kuwa >miaka 8.
• Rangi ya latex ya ndani: Inazingatia zaidi usalama wa mazingira (VOC ya chini, harufu ndogo), uwezo wa kufunika na hisi ya uso. Haihitaji kupinga UV lakini inapaswa kustahimili kupanguswa.
• Hazipaswi kuchanganywa: Rangi ya ndani ikitumika nje itaoza na kubomoka haraka; rangi ya nje ikitumika ndani viashiria vya mazingira vinaweza kutotimiza viwango (formula ya resin ni tofauti).
• Rangi ya msingi (primer) ni lazima: Iwe ndani au nje, primer inazuia alkali na kuongeza ushikamano — kuiacha primer husababisha rangi kubomoka na kuwa na mabaka.
helpCenter.decoration_q6: Kuna aina gani za vifaa vya kuhami joto?
helpCenter.decoration_a6:
Aina za kawaida:
• XPS (Extruded Polystyrene): Muundo wa seli zilizofungwa, kiwango cha chini sana cha kunyonya maji, nguvu ya juu, inafaa kwa kuhami joto kwa sakafu, paa, na stoo za baridi.
• EPS (Expanded Polystyrene): Muundo wa seli zilizo wazi, kupitisha hewa vizuri, inafaa kwa mifumo ya kuhami joto kwa kuta za nje.
• Bodi ya jiwe la madini (Rockwool): Daraja A la kutowaka, utendaji mzuri wa kupunguza kelele, inafaa kwa kuta za nje za majengo yenye mahitaji ya juu ya kupinga moto, kuta za kugawanya, na kuhami mabomba. Kasoro ni kuogopa maji — kinga ya unyevu inahitajika.
• Pamba ya kioo (Glass Wool): Nyepesi, kuhami joto na kupunguza kelele vizuri, mara nyingi hutumika kwa mabomba ya hewa ya viyoyozi, dari, na kuhami majengo ya muundo wa chuma.
• Bomba/bodi ya mpira-plastiki ya kuhami: Unyumbulifu mzuri, inafaa kwa kuhami mabomba (mabomba ya viyoyozi, mabomba ya maji baridi).
Kanuni ya kuchagua: Kwanza angalia mahitaji ya daraja la kupinga moto (daraja A la kutowaka chagua rockwool/glass wool), kisha angalia utendaji wa kuhami (coeffisient ya joto ndogo ni bora), na mwisho angalia urahisi wa ujenzi.
helpCenter.decoration_q7: Tofauti kati ya grout ya mapambo na grout ya kawaida ni nini?
helpCenter.decoration_a7:
• Grout ya kawaida (ya saruji nyeupe): Nyenzo ya jadi ya kujaza mipaka, inakuwa na ukungu na kuwa nyeusi kwa urahisi, inabadilika rangi baada ya kunyonya maji. Inafaa kwa kazi za ujenzi ambapo urembo si kipaumbele.
• Grout ya mapambo (ya epoxy resin): Uso laini kama keramiki, kuzuia maji na ukungu, haibadilishi rangi, rangi nyingi za kuchagua. Inafaa kwa bafuni, jikoni na maeneo mengine yanayohitaji kuzuia maji na urembo.
• Tofauti za ujenzi: Grout ya kawaida inapakwa moja kwa moja kwenye mipaka; grout ya mapambo inapaswa kupakwa siku 1-2 baada ya grout ya msingi (vinginevyo itazama ndani), inapakwa kwa bunduki maalum ya gundi kwenye mipaka.
• Ulinganisho wa gharama: Bei ya grout ya mapambo ni mara 5-8 ya grout ya kawaida, lakini muda wa matengenezo ni mrefu zaidi — kwa muda mrefu ni ya faida zaidi.
helpCenter.decoration_q8: Ufungashaji na usafirishaji wa vifaa vya mapambo unalindwaje?
helpCenter.decoration_a8:
Njia za kawaida za kufungasha kwa kategoria tofauti:
• Vigae: Ufungashaji wa fremu ya mbao au sanduku la mbao, kila safu imetenganishwa na kadibodi. Wakati wa usafirishaji wa bahari, vinafungwa imara kuzuia kuhamia na kugongana.
• Rangi/Mafuta: Ndoo zilizofungwa kwa ukali, zikiambatanishwa na MSDS (Karatasi ya Data ya Usalama). Bidhaa zenye vimumunyisho husafirishwa kupitia njia maalum ya bidhaa hatari.
• Bodi: Zimepangwa gorofa, kingo zinalindwa na chuma cha pembe au mbao, zimefunikwa na filamu ya kuzuia unyevu.
• Karatasi za kuzuia maji: Zinasimamishwa wakati wa usafirishaji ili kuepuka kupinda kwa shinikizo.
• Vifaa vya kuhami joto: Vinabandikwa kwa kubana ili kupunguza kiasi, vinajirudi kwa kawaida baada ya kufika.
Jukwaa hukagua ufungashaji wa kila consignment kabla ya kutuma ili kuhakikisha unakidhi viwango vya usafirishaji wa bahari. Kwa vifaa vikubwa vya ujenzi, pia tunatoa mapendekezo ya mpangilio wa kupakia kontena ili kutumia nafasi ya kontena kwa ufanisi mkubwa zaidi.

terms.title: Masharti ya Huduma
terms.s1_content:
Welcome to BuildReach. These Terms of Service apply to your access to, registration for, and use of the BuildReach website, mobile pages, quotation system, order tracking, customer communications, and related procurement services.

The platform is operated by BuildReach Ltd., with registered address [To be completed: registered office address], company registration number [To be completed: company registration number], and contact email info@buildreach.co.tz. Unless otherwise agreed in writing, these terms are entered into between you and BuildReach Ltd.

By registering an account, submitting an RFQ, confirming a quotation, uploading materials, or continuing to use the platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these terms.

If you use the platform on behalf of a company, shop, contractor, wholesaler, or other organization, you confirm that you are authorized to accept these terms on behalf of that organization. If you are not authorized, you must stop using the platform.

The platform may display, confirm, and record transactions electronically. Under applicable Tanzanian electronic transactions laws, electronic records, electronic confirmations, and platform system records may be used as evidence of transactions and communications.
terms.s2_title: Platform Role and Scope of Services
terms.s2_content:
BuildReach is a B2B cross-border building materials procurement platform for the East African market, connecting building material suppliers, factories, logistics providers, inspection agencies, and East African buyers.

The platform may provide product display, specification information, procurement information organization, online RFQ submission, quotation collection, quotation comparison, supplier sourcing, procurement coordination, inspection coordination, support for PVoC, CoC, TBS, KEBS, or other import compliance documents, consolidated shipping, international logistics coordination, order tracking, and after-sales coordination.

Unless BuildReach and the buyer separately sign a sales contract, pro forma invoice, purchase order, or other written document expressly stating that BuildReach acts as seller, BuildReach generally acts as a procurement service provider, coordinator, or information service provider, and not as the manufacturer of goods. Product quality, origin, certification, production capacity, and delivery capability remain the responsibility of the actual supplier, manufacturer, logistics provider, or relevant third party under applicable law and contract.
terms.s3_content:
The platform is mainly intended for business users. You should be a duly established or lawfully operating company, shop, wholesaler, contractor, project owner, or other business entity, or a person authorized by such entity.

You must provide true, accurate, and complete registration information, including name, mobile number, WhatsApp contact, email, company name, business address, business category, storefront photos, business license, or other qualification materials where applicable.

You are responsible for safeguarding your account, password, verification codes, and login devices. Losses caused by poor custody, authorized or unauthorized use by others, false information, or improper operation shall be borne by you. If the platform identifies false registration, fraud, circumvention, abnormal login, or other risks, it may restrict, suspend, or terminate the account.
terms.s4_content:
Buyers may submit RFQs through the platform. The platform may organize supplier quotations, logistics costs, certification costs, inspection costs, and other related costs based on buyer requirements.

Unless expressly marked as a final confirmed quotation or confirmed by pro forma invoice, purchase order, payment confirmation, or other written document, prices and lead times shown on the platform, product pages, preliminary quotations, or chat records are for reference only and do not constitute a final offer or commitment.

Quotations may be affected by raw material prices, exchange rates, freight, port charges, customs duties, policy changes, inventory changes, supplier adjustments, and shipping schedules. The validity period of quotations shall be as shown on the page, quotation, or written confirmation.

Order formation, payment milestones, cancellation rules, delivery terms, and liability for breach shall be subject to the final confirmed quotation, pro forma invoice, purchase order, sales contract, or other written document.
terms.s5_content:
Unless expressly stated otherwise, prices or quotations displayed on the platform may exclude international freight, insurance, port charges, customs clearance fees, import duties, VAT, destination port storage, inland transport, certification fees, inspection fees, bank charges, and other third-party costs.

Buyers must pay purchase prices and related fees according to the final confirmed documents. Payment method, account, currency, exchange rate, payment deadline, and consequences of late payment shall be subject to written confirmation.

The platform may not currently provide online payment functionality. Before making offline payment, buyers must verify the payee, bank account, and payment purpose. Risks arising from payment to private accounts not formally confirmed by the platform, payment outside the platform, or payment to unauthorized persons shall be borne by the buyer.
terms.s6_title: International Trade, Customs Clearance, and Compliance
terms.s6_content:
Cross-border building materials procurement may involve export declaration, import clearance, PVoC, CoC, TBS, KEBS, product testing, pre-shipment inspection, import permits, taxes, destination market standards, and other regulatory requirements.

Unless otherwise agreed in writing, the buyer is responsible for confirming destination country requirements for products, quantities, use, certifications, labels, manuals, packaging, customs documents, and import permits. The platform may assist with preparation or coordination of documents, but does not guarantee approval by any government authority, certification body, customs office, port, or third party. Delays, detentions, fines, returns, or additional costs caused by inaccurate buyer information, insufficient import qualifications, policy changes, customs inspections, certification delays, incomplete documents, or government action shall be borne by the buyer. Incoterms, risk transfer, title transfer, and cost allocation shall follow the final confirmed Incoterms or written transaction documents.
terms.s7_content:
The platform may assist with pre-shipment inspection, photos, video inspection, sampling, or third-party inspection. Unless expressly agreed in writing, inspection is normally sampling-based and is not a guarantee that all goods are defect-free.

After receiving goods, the buyer must promptly check packaging, quantity, specifications, model, visible damage, obvious quality issues, and accompanying documents. The buyer must notify the platform with photos, videos, bills of lading, packing lists, inspection reports, or other evidence within 3 business days for packaging damage, shortage, or obvious wrong shipment; within 7 business days for visible quality issues or specification/model mismatch; and within a reasonable period after discovery for hidden defects, subject to applicable law or agreed warranty period.

Failure to raise timely objection shall be deemed acceptance of issues discoverable through reasonable inspection. The platform will coordinate suppliers, factories, logistics providers, or insurers to handle replenishment, repair, replacement, discount, claim, or other solutions based on the circumstances.

The platform is not responsible for issues caused by wrong selection, unsuitable use environment, improper installation, unauthorized modification, overload, failure to follow instructions, natural wear and tear, destination regulatory changes, or third-party transport/storage damage.
terms.s8_content:
You must not submit false company, identity, storefront, qualification, delivery, or payment information; use the platform for fraud, money laundering, tax evasion, smuggling, sanctions circumvention, intellectual property infringement, or other illegal activity; circumvent the platform or induce suppliers or users to transact outside the platform; upload viruses, malicious code, illegal content, or infringing materials; scrape, copy, reverse engineer, interfere with, or harm platform systems; impersonate others, steal verification codes, attack the platform, or abuse customer service channels.

If such conduct is identified, the platform may delete content, suspend services, cancel orders, freeze accounts, preserve evidence, and report to regulators or law enforcement authorities.
terms.s9_content:
Trademarks, logos, page designs, images, videos, product materials, copy, databases, software, technical solutions, and other platform content belong to BuildReach or relevant rights holders.

Without written authorization, users may not copy, download, modify, distribute, display, sell, scrape, or use such content for commercial purposes. Users must ensure that uploaded materials are lawfully owned or authorized and do not infringe third-party intellectual property, trade secrets, privacy, or other rights.
terms.s10_content:
Platform services may involve suppliers, factories, inspection agencies, certification bodies, logistics companies, customs brokers, ports, shipping lines, payment institutions, cloud service providers, and communications providers.

The platform will use reasonable care in selecting or coordinating third parties, but third-party services are independently provided by the relevant third party. The platform will reasonably assist in communication regarding delays, errors, losses, or costs caused by third parties, but does not assume liability beyond applicable law or written contract.
terms.s11_content:
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the platform does not guarantee that product information, images, stock, prices, certification status, and delivery times are always accurate or updated in real time; that suppliers, logistics providers, certification bodies, or government authorities will perform as expected; that platform services will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure; or that goods obtained through the platform will necessarily be suitable for a buyer’s particular use, project requirements, or local regulatory requirements.

Except for personal injury, fraud, or liabilities that cannot legally be limited, the platform shall not be liable for indirect losses, loss of profit, business interruption, loss of goodwill, loss of expected revenue, data loss, exchange rate loss, delay loss, or third-party claims.

Where the platform is liable by law or contract, unless mandatory law provides otherwise, its aggregate liability shall not exceed the platform service fee actually paid by the buyer for the relevant service; if no separate platform service fee was paid, liability shall not exceed [To be completed: liability cap percentage or amount] of the relevant order amount.
terms.s12_content:
The platform shall not be liable for failure or delay caused by events beyond reasonable control, including natural disasters, epidemics, war, unrest, strikes, port congestion, vessel cancellation, customs inspections, government controls, import/export policy changes, power or network outages, supplier shutdowns, material exchange rate fluctuations, and international logistics disruptions.

The affected party shall notify the other party within a reasonable period and take reasonable measures to reduce losses.
terms.s13_content: The platform processes personal data and business contact information according to the Privacy Policy. The Privacy Policy forms part of these terms. By using the platform, you confirm that you have read and agree to the collection, use, sharing, storage, and protection of data as described in the Privacy Policy.
terms.s14_content:
The platform may update these terms based on business, legal, or regulatory requirements. Updated terms will be published on the platform with the last updated date. For material changes, the platform will notify users through page prompts, in-platform notices, email, or other reasonable means.

If you do not agree to the updated terms, you should stop using the platform. Continued use after updates constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.s15_content:
These terms are governed by and construed under the laws of the United Republic of Tanzania.

Disputes arising from these terms or platform services shall first be resolved through friendly consultation. If consultation fails, either party may submit the dispute to a court of competent jurisdiction in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania, unless the parties separately agree in writing to arbitration.
terms.s16_content:
If you have questions about these terms, orders, accounts, or platform services, please contact:

BuildReach Ltd.
Email: info@buildreach.co.tz
Address: [To be completed: registered office address]
Customer Service / WhatsApp: [To be completed: customer service number, preferably in +255 international format]

privacy.title: Sera ya Faragha
privacy.s1_content:
BuildReach values your privacy and personal data protection. This Privacy Policy explains how BuildReach Ltd. collects, uses, shares, stores, and protects your personal data when you access, register for, or use the platform.

This policy is prepared with reference to Tanzania’s Personal Data Protection Act, 2022 and related data protection rules. BuildReach Ltd. is the data controller under this policy, with registered address [To be completed: registered office address], company registration number [To be completed: company registration number], and contact email info@buildreach.co.tz.

This policy applies to the BuildReach website, mobile pages, RFQ system, order tracking, customer communications, WhatsApp communications, email notices, and other data processing activities related to platform services.

This policy mainly covers natural person information of business user contacts, buyer representatives, supplier representatives, logistics or service provider contacts. Company names, business licenses, storefront photos, and transaction records may also be personal data where they identify a natural person.
privacy.s2_content: To provide cross-border building materials procurement services, we may collect account and registration information such as name, mobile number, WhatsApp contact, email, account, password hash, language preference, company name, business address, business category, role, and country/region; identity and qualification information such as storefront photos, business license photos, company registration documents, tax numbers, import qualifications, authorization documents, and project or procurement qualification materials; procurement and transaction information such as browsing records, search records, RFQs, product requirements, quotations, orders, payment confirmations, invoices, logistics information, consignee information, delivery addresses, customs documents, certification documents, after-sales records, and dispute materials; communications information from platform, phone, email, WhatsApp, online customer service, attachments, photos, videos, voice messages, communication time, and handling records; device, log, and security information such as IP address, browser type, device type, operating system, access time, page visits, cookies, language settings, login records, verification code sending records, abnormal operation records, and security audit logs; and information from third parties such as suppliers, logistics providers, customs brokers, certification bodies, payment or banking service providers, public business registries, or authorized third parties where necessary.
privacy.s3_content:
We process your personal data only for lawful, explicit, and necessary purposes, including creating, managing, and protecting your account; verifying identity, business information, procurement qualifications, and contact details; processing RFQs, quotations, procurement, inspection, logistics, customs clearance, certification, and after-sales; communicating order progress, platform notices, verification codes, security alerts, and customer service matters; arranging suppliers, factories, logistics providers, certification bodies, customs brokers, or inspection agencies; improving platform features, product display, search experience, and service quality; protecting platform security and preventing fraud, account misuse, malicious attacks, illegal transactions, or abnormal risks; and complying with legal, tax, audit, compliance, regulatory, or dispute resolution obligations.

We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.s4_content:
Depending on the circumstances, our processing may be based on contract performance or pre-contractual steps; compliance with applicable law, regulation, tax, audit, or government requirements; legitimate business interests such as platform security, transaction record keeping, fraud prevention, and dispute handling; your consent for specific activities such as marketing or non-essential cookies; or protection of vital interests.

Where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw consent under applicable law. Withdrawal does not affect the lawfulness of processing before withdrawal.
privacy.s5_content:
To complete cross-border procurement services, we may share necessary information with suppliers, factories, or trade service providers; inspection agencies, certification bodies, and laboratories; logistics companies, shipping lines, freight forwarders, warehousing providers, customs brokers, and port service providers; payment institutions, banks, accountants, auditors, tax or insurance providers; cloud service providers, email providers, SMS or WhatsApp communications providers, data storage, and IT security providers; lawyers, advisers, courts, arbitral bodies, regulators, government authorities, or law enforcement; and relevant transaction parties and advisers in mergers, acquisitions, financing, asset transfers, reorganizations, or similar transactions.

We require third parties to process personal data only as necessary and to apply reasonable data protection measures.
privacy.s6_content:
Because the platform involves Chinese suppliers, East African buyers, international logistics, certification, and cloud services, your personal data may be transferred outside Tanzania, including to China, Kenya, other East African countries, or locations where cloud service providers host servers.

For cross-border transfers, we will take reasonable safeguards, including transferring only data necessary for procurement, logistics, certification, customer service, or compliance purposes; agreeing confidentiality and data protection obligations with relevant third parties; using access controls, encrypted transmission, and permission management; and obtaining consent, completing registration, assessment, or other compliance steps where required by applicable law.
privacy.s7_content:
The platform may use cookies, log files, or similar technologies for login sessions, language preferences, cart/RFQ basket, analytics, security risk control, and service optimization.

You may refuse or delete cookies through browser settings. However, disabling essential cookies may affect login, RFQs, order tracking, and security verification.
privacy.s8_content:
We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data, including access controls, password hash storage, encrypted transmission, log auditing, backup management, least privilege, and employee confidentiality obligations.

No internet transmission or electronic storage method can be guaranteed absolutely secure. You should also protect your account password, verification codes, and login devices, and avoid submitting sensitive materials through unofficial channels.

When officially launched and collecting personal data, the platform should use HTTPS encryption. If you detect suspicious links, account anomalies, or data breach risks, please contact us immediately.
privacy.s9_content:
We retain personal data only for as long as needed for the purposes described in this policy, unless legal, tax, audit, regulatory, or dispute resolution needs require longer retention.

Generally, account information is retained until a reasonable period after account deletion; transaction, order, payment, logistics, and customs records are retained according to commercial, tax, audit, and legal requirements; customer service, after-sales, and dispute records are retained for a reasonable period after resolution; security logs, login records, and verification code records are retained for shorter periods as needed for security risk control; and legal procedure, regulatory investigation, or dispute-related materials are retained until the matter and relevant limitation periods end.

After the retention period, we will delete, anonymize, or otherwise lawfully handle the relevant data.
privacy.s10_content:
Subject to applicable law, you may have rights to confirm whether we process your personal data; access and obtain a copy of your personal data; correct inaccurate or incomplete data; request deletion where legal conditions are met; request restriction of or object to certain processing; request data portability where applicable; withdraw consent; close your account; and complain to the Tanzanian personal data protection authority.

To protect accounts and data, we may ask you to verify your identity before handling your request. We may lawfully refuse or restrict requests that are manifestly repetitive, unfounded, affect others’ rights, or concern data that must be retained by law, and we will explain the reason where appropriate.
privacy.s11_content: The platform is intended for business users and is not directed to minors. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If you believe a minor has provided personal data to us, please contact us and we will handle it lawfully after verification.
privacy.s12_content:
Where permitted by law, we may send information about platform services, procurement opportunities, order progress, system security, and policy updates.

For non-essential marketing, you may opt out through the unsubscribe method or customer service. Even if you opt out of marketing, we may still send necessary account security, order performance, or legal notices.
privacy.s13_content: If a personal data breach occurs that may affect your rights and freedoms, we will take remedial measures as required by applicable law and notify affected users and relevant regulators where necessary.
privacy.s14_content:
We may update this Privacy Policy due to business, legal, or technical changes. The updated policy will be published on the platform with the last updated date. For material changes, we will notify you through page prompts, in-platform notices, email, or other reasonable means.

If you do not agree to the updated policy, you should stop using the platform. Continued use after updates constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
